subject: tx gen land office oct 2000 prod

emails.subject: TX Gen Land Office Oct 2000 Prod
emails.subject_base: TX Gen Land Office Oct 2000 Prod
emails.body: TX Gen Land Office Oct 2000 Prod Daren- Deal 421859 Sales Deal 421847 Purchase Settlements is showing both a sales and purchase for Texas General Land Office and they are stating that they should not be billed or paid for anything. Are these deals suppose to be a washout and netted together? If so, the volumes are not matching: the sales on HPL are 7,440 mmbtus on deal #421859 and the purchase on MidTX is 6,629 mmbtus. Let me know what type of deal this was intended to be. FYI I was told that Tom Acton was handling this deal, but I believe he will be out until after Thanksgiving.

emails.subject: Re: TX Gen Land Office Oct 2000 Prod
emails.subject_base: TX Gen Land Office Oct 2000 Prod
emails.body: Re: TX Gen Land Office Oct 2000 Prod The buy and sale should net out, nothing to be billed to paid to TGLO. The volumes should be the same on both sides. Whoever backs up Tom should reallocate in POPS to make this happen. We had to show a buy/sale in order to schedule the delivery to TGLO on a third party pipe. D Katherine Herrera@ENRON 11/17/2000 04:30 PM
